THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOVE, RHONDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 473 ELLIS STREET #310, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $218.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $218.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-07-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $104 IF FORFEITED. IF PREMISES TIMELY VACATED AND STIPULATION TERMS FULFILLED, ACTION SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
